# LingoLand Tunisia

> Official English coursebooks and educational resources aligned with the Tunisian curriculum.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://lingo-land.net/
- Store: https://lingo-land.net/Store/
- About: https://lingo-land.net/About/
- Resources: https://lingo-land.net/Resources/
- Students Hall: https://lingo-land.net/students-hall/
- Survey: https://lingo-land.net/survey/
- Contact: https://lingo-land.net/Contact/

## Commerce pages
- Product template: https://lingo-land.net/Store/product.html

## Brand facts
- Brand: LingoLand Tunisia
- Founder: Bessem Mbarek
- Location: Sfax, Tunisia
- Support email: contact@lingo-land.net
- Phone: +216 22 571 291

## Crawl guidance
- Public pages are intended for indexing.
- Utility pages such as checkout and test pages are not intended for indexing.
- Canonical sitemap: https://lingo-land.net/sitemap.xml
